notes: HW Matrix GB300 refresh — Phase 1 (structural fix, no new fault content). The GB200/300 filter chip now surfaces the 105 universal physical-fault cards (m:'B') alongside the 22 Blackwell cards (m:'G') instead of hiding them — AUS-01 runs GB300 NVL72, and the universal optics/fiber/FEC/IB/NVLink/power/LED guidance was being dropped from the closest-platform view. Two edits in hwMatrix_render: filter GB200 branch now admits 'B' as well as 'G'; modelTag else-branch relabeled 'H100/H200' -> 'UNIVERSAL' so platform-agnostic faults stop reading as Hopper-only. No card data changed; H100/H200 chips unchanged (already admitted 'B'). Phase 2 (GB300-specific content, needs domain sign-off) and the GB300 chip remain parked. v1.6.69-74 features all intact; three stamps at v1.6.75.
